executives.name: Heather Laxton
executives.background: Ms. Laxton has over 20 years of experience in corporate governance and legal affairs within the mining industry.

executives.name: Jeffrey Parr
executives.background: Mr. Parr is the Vice-Chair of the Board. He was previously the Chair of the Board of Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Kevin Bullock
executives.background: Mr. Bullock is a registered Professional Mining Engineer and CEO of Signal Gold Inc.

executives.name: Paul Kostuik
executives.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Philip Yee
executives.background: Philip Yee is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in corporate finance, financial reporting, and strategic planning in the mining industry. Prior to Eldorado, he was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer at Kirkland Lake Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Raymond Threlkeld
executives.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.

executives.name: Tony Makuch
executives.background: Mr. Makuch is a professional engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as President and CEO of Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. from 2016 to 2022, where he led the company through significant growth and its eventual merger with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited. He has also held executive roles at Lake Shore Gold Corp. and FNX Mining Company Inc.

executives.name: Jason Neal
executives.background: Mr. Neal was previously the President and CEO of TMAC Resources and Co-Head of Global Metals and Mining at BMO Capital Markets.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Parr
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parr is the Vice-Chair of the Board. He was previously the Chair of the Board of Kirkland Lake Gold Ltd. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Kostuik
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Raymond Threlkeld
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Threlkeld has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Rainy River Resources and held senior roles at Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Dawn Whittaker
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Whittaker is a senior lawyer with over 30 years of experience in corporate law, mergers and acquisitions, and corporate governance.

tenure_dates.title: Director / Chair of Corporate Governance Committee

board_of_directors.name: Jeff Parr
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parr is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has served on the boards of several mining companies.
